posts.author: MarcoLupi (@)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I am facing this challenge here. I am recreating a database for resource management that I had in Excel.

The issue that I am facing is the following. From this board where there is general info of the resource, I can insert the start date and the end date.

image1074×445 25.2 KB

What I would like to reflect this information in second board, like this:

image1522×499 38.4 KB

In other words, I would like that m.com can automatically fill in the days for each month between the dates. I need this data also in this kind of format to extract them an pass the to the finance team to do some cost calculations.

Do you think is something possible on Monday.com?

Thanks,

Marco
